name: ames-lytho
description: Lytho Workflow MCP connector for work requests, tasks, proofs, projects, campaigns, files, and preferences through the Lytho Open API.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude and Codex to Lytho workflows and requests.
interface.longDescription: A Lytho Workflow MCP connector for working with requests, tasks, proofs, projects, campaigns, files, and preferences through the Lytho Open API. Requires LYTHO_CLIENT_ID, LYTHO_CLIENT_SECRET, and LYTHO_TOKEN_URL.
defaultPrompt: Find the status of this campaign in Lytho.
